title: Verify zero pytest and spec parity
description: Audit repo to ensure no pytest tests or dependencies remain unless required by Behave. Confirm Gherkin specs are identical for Python and Rust and all scenarios pass.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Verification: rg pytest shows no references in repo docs/configs. python/pyproject.toml has no pytest deps. Spec parity check passes. Behave passes shared specs; cargo test runs cucumber with rust/features/specs. Coverage via behave is 55%, tracked in tskl-pkw.3.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: No pytest references in code or configs. Spec parity check passes with identical Gherkin files. Behave and Cucumber suites pass.
